55.reason: [The function name 'delete' is a reserved keyword in C++ and may cause compilation issues with some compilers even in C mode, especially if headers like <ctype.h> pull in C++-compatible definitions or if the compiler treats it as a keyword. This can lead to a compilation error.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The function name 'delete' is a reserved keyword in C++ and may cause compilation issues with some compilers even in C mode, especially if headers like <ctype.h> pull in C++-compatible definitions or if the compiler treats it as a keyword. This can lead to a compilation error.]
